tldr: Isaac del Toro won the summit finish at Camerino three seconds clear of Johannessen and Jorgenson — the GC sealed on the queen stage. Pellizzari fourth at +9 lost contact with the lead trio.

narrative.headline: Del Toro's queen-stage stamp
narrative.body: 188 km, summit finish at Camerino. Del Toro attacked late on the climb; only Johannessen could follow with Jorgenson on his wheel. Pellizzari, the secondary GC threat, lost six seconds.

gcImpact.headline: GC sealed for Del Toro
gcImpact.body: Stage win + bonus seconds + three-second margin on the climbing rivals. The week was Del Toro's.

riderPerformances.name: Matteo Jorgenson
riderPerformances.narrative: Stage 3, three seconds back on Del Toro's queen-stage move. The Ardennes form line getting drawn.
